body.title: Nightly turn-trace review: Igor reads own cloud escapes, deposits gap nodes
body.result: review_turn_traces() added to learner.py + PROC_TRACE_REVIEW seeded (86400s). Found 3 cloud escapes from last 24h → RL_060-062 + TWM NARRATIVE_GAP(salience=0.75). Idempotent confirmed.
body.description: Scheduled nightly habit reads recent turn traces, identifies cloud escalations, deposits PROCEDURAL gap nodes into memories table so the plug-building loop is self-running.
